body.title: [dependency] Author-as-judge: route filing-time audits + proof-test review to an independent examiner
body.description:
DESIGN COMPLETE 2026-07-08 -> architecture/cc.0.examiner-station.20260708.063926739676.json (examine verb on evaluator, identity-stamped verdict + run-record, UNEXAMINED loud fallback, refutation framing + panel escalation, constraint curation, build order; Q1 open: proof-review gate-vs-annotate). BUILD stays gated on T-audit-run-records-enforced.

intention: I intend that no artifact is graded by the instance that authored it — separation of powers at filing time, matching the stations invariant at build time.

gate-attack-report.20260707.md G2/G3/G6a: audit-hypothesis/design/ticket are executed by the SAME model instance that drafted the artifacts (live evidence 2026-07-07: the /sorted batch was author-audited); proof-on-close cannot distinguish intent-tests from echo-tests — only an independent reader can. D-dev-pipeline-stations-2026-07-07 already establishes the invariant (builder never grades own work) and names the EXAMINER station (evaluator device = 3-voter panel exists). Shape: filing-time audits and proof-test review become examiner dispatches — an independent instance (evaluator device, or a separate minion/tier call through the Proxy) receives the draft + the audit checklist and returns the verdict; the authoring session merely relays. Includes G3d: constraint_decorator's indiscriminate 51-constraint stamping gets curated by the examiner path.

**Affected files:** per design: unseen_university/devices/evaluator/ (examiner surface), skills/sorted/SKILL.md + skills/audit-ticket|design|hypothesis (dispatch instead of self-run), inference proxy tier call

**Design rules:** separation of powers (D-dev-pipeline-stations-2026-07-07); tier-not-model; Granny sole ticket writer unaffected (examiner returns verdicts, never writes tickets)

**Scope boundary:** filing-time audits + proof-test review routing ONLY; the audit CHECKLISTS are unchanged; offline fallback (no examiner reachable) = file with a loud UNEXAMINED mark, never silent self-audit.

**Test plan:** hermetic — draft + checklist dispatched, verdict consumed; fallback path marks UNEXAMINED; author-instance verdict path removed from skills.

**Completion criteria:** a /sorted batch's audit verdicts carry an examiner identity != the authoring session; UNEXAMINED mark appears when examiner is down.

**Validation:** Observable via examiner verdict records naming the examiner instance (log + run-record per T-audit-run-records-enforced).

audit-emphasis: needs-deep-smell

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that no artifact is graded by the instance that authored it — separation of powers at filing time.
